cuts.title: 시원한 마찰, 테이블 엣지의 휴식
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 1.1 prompt - Cool friction on a stainless edge

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 160, 35mm film. Fine grain, low contrast, clean muted tones, soft cloudy daylight, cool gray palette. A crisp urban rainy-day lifestyle portrait that feels fresh, quiet, and gently tactile.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman rests lightly against a stainless steel espresso bar table, as if she has just escaped the humid monsoon air outside. The scene feels calm and breathable. The cold metal edge, the soft modal fabric, and her relaxed expression create a quiet contrast between summer dampness and clean cool comfort.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Modern espresso bar in Seongsu-dong, Seoul, during a cloudy summer monsoon afternoon. Exposed concrete walls, stainless steel bar counter, misty windows, and soft gray daylight filtering through rainy glass.

## 4) Background & Props
Brushed stainless steel table with a long clean horizontal reflection, exposed concrete wall, matte glass tumbler with iced coffee, faint rain blur beyond the window, minimal urban café details.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium shot. The stainless table line cuts softly across the middle of the frame. Yulim leans one forearm on the table, shoulders relaxed, body angled slightly to the side. Her face is clearly visible, gaze gently toward the camera with calm, unforced warmth.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long layered dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and slightly asymmetric see-through bangs with a 7:3 part. Natural Korean SNS lifestyle beauty mood, clean and approachable. Outfit: white modal sleeveless top, charcoal gray nylon parachute long skirt. Makeup: thin semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eye shadow, moist soft pink lip balm texture. Expression: quiet, comfortable, slightly warm but not posed.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft overcast daylight, cool gray reflections, low contrast, clean skin tone, long brushed-metal highlights, subtle film grain. The air should feel freshly cooled, like touching a chilled surface after walking through humid rain.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Make the viewer feel the coolness of the stainless table against warm skin and soft fabric. The image should feel clean, breathable, and quietly stylish, not stiff or overly posed.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 손끝으로 전해지는 성에의 냉기
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 1.2 prompt - Frost melting under fingertips

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 160, 35mm film. Fine grain, pastel muted tones, soft daylight, low contrast, clean editorial texture. A quiet close lifestyle frame focused on cool glass, fingertips, and summer relief.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman holds a frosted matte glass with both hands. The cold surface slowly melts under her fingertips, leaving tiny clear droplets. The moment feels small and private, like the first breath of comfort after a sticky rainy afternoon.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Modern espresso bar in Seongsu-dong on a humid monsoon day. Cool indoor air, cloudy daylight through the rain-streaked window, stainless counter nearby.

## 4) Background & Props
Matte frosted glass tumbler filled with iced drink, condensation, melting frost, stainless steel table surface, soft gray café background blurred into gentle bokeh.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical close-up portrait. Focus on Yulim’s hands wrapped around the frosted glass, with her face softly visible above or behind the glass in shallow depth of field. Her gaze is lowered toward the drink, not directly at the camera. The frame should feel intimate and tactile.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer eye corners, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural waves and see-through bangs. Outfit: white modal sleeveless top, charcoal gray nylon parachute skirt partly visible. Makeup: transparent semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft lip balm lips. Expression: quietly focused, peaceful, almost smiling while feeling the cold glass.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft cloudy daylight with cool reflected highlights from stainless steel. Pale gray, white, muted charcoal, and transparent water droplets. Skin should look clean and fresh, with gentle highlight rolloff.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The glass and fingers must tell the story. Show the sensation of cold condensation, warm fingertips, and slow melting frost. Avoid making it look like a product shot; it should feel like a lived-in lifestyle moment.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 바스락거리는 해방감의 실루엣
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 1.3 prompt - Nylon silhouette turning by the rainy window

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 160, 35mm film. Muted cool gray tones, fine grain, soft daylight, low contrast, clean modern rainy-day mood. A light urban lifestyle frame with crisp fabric movement.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman turns halfway toward the café window while holding a cold drink in one hand. Her nylon parachute skirt catches the air and opens into a soft, crinkled silhouette. The humid rain outside feels far away, while her movement feels light and cool.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Modern espresso bar in Seongsu-dong, Seoul, during a rainy summer afternoon. Large glass window with blurred rain trails, stainless steel counter, concrete interior, cool indoor atmosphere.

## 4) Background & Props
Rainy window, stainless steel table edge, iced drink in matte glass tumbler, exposed concrete, faint reflections on the metal surface.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical full-to-medium shot. Yulim stands near the stainless bar, body turned halfway toward the rainy window, one hand holding the glass. The nylon skirt forms a subtle airy volume. Her face is visible in a soft three-quarter angle, gaze drifting toward the window.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, long layered dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: white modal sleeveless top and charcoal gray nylon parachute long skirt with crisp crinkled texture. Makeup: clean semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eye makeup, moist soft pink lip. Expression: relaxed, quietly refreshed, a tiny smile held back.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Cool cloudy daylight, soft reflections on stainless steel, gray-blue rainy window light, muted concrete tones. The skirt texture should look dry, crisp, and lightly rustling.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Capture the visual sound of nylon: light, airy, slightly crinkled. The frame should feel like a cool exhale inside a rainy city café.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 니트의 여백과 실크의 물결
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 2.1 prompt - Knit gaps and silk waves

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on CineStill 800T, 35mm film. Warm low light, cinematic amber tones, soft red halation around practical lamps, subtle film grain, deep private rainy-night mood.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sits back on a velvet sofa, gently closing the front of her loose summer knit cardigan. Through the open knit texture, deep blue silk catches a thin line of warm light. The room feels like a quiet shelter from the rain outside, full of soft music and slow breathing.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private music lounge at night during summer monsoon season. Warm amber lamps, walnut wood panel walls, velvet sofa, rain-muted city outside.

## 4) Background & Props
Dark velvet sofa, walnut wood panels, low table, softly glowing lamp, a few LP records nearby, warm shadows absorbed into the room.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium close-up. Yulim sits slightly angled on the velvet sofa, one shoulder relaxed, fingers lightly gathering the knit cardigan. The silk slip dress and net knit texture should both be visible. Her gaze is directed off-camera toward the sound of music.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer corners, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: deep blue silk slip dress, ivory loose summer net knit cardigan draped naturally over one shoulder. Makeup: semi-glow clean skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft moist lips. Expression: sleepy, peaceful, private, quietly absorbed in the room.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Low amber indoor light, warm highlights sliding across silk, velvet absorbing shadows, subtle CineStill halation near small lamps. Deep blue, ivory, walnut brown, and amber tones.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The contrast between airy knit holes and fluid silk shine is the emotional center. The image should feel like hearing a slow record play while rain taps somewhere outside.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 종이의 마찰음과 바이닐의 윤기
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 2.2 prompt - Paper friction and vinyl gloss

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on CineStill 800T, 35mm film. Warm tungsten glow, soft cinematic halation, gentle film grain, low-light intimate music lounge mood.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman carefully slides an LP record out of its paper sleeve. One hand presses the slightly rough paper surface, while the other supports the glossy vinyl edge. It feels quiet enough to hear the small dry friction of paper against record.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private music lounge on a rainy summer night. Cozy amber light, walnut wood walls, velvet seating, low table with music objects.

## 4) Background & Props
LP record, textured paper sleeve, dark glossy vinyl, low walnut table, velvet sofa edge, warm lamp glow in the background.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical close-up to medium close-up. Yulim’s hands and the LP are the focus, with her face softly visible above the record in shallow depth of field. Her head tilts slightly downward, eyes following the vinyl edge. The shot should feel slow and careful.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, soft pink lips, dark ash chocolate brown layered hair with natural waves and see-through bangs. Outfit: deep blue silk slip dress with ivory summer net knit cardigan loosely draped. Makeup: clean semi-glow base, soft peach blush, natural brown eyes, moist soft pink lip. Expression: quiet concentration, relaxed lips, calm private mood.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Warm amber practical light, glossy vinyl catching a curved highlight, paper sleeve matte and tactile, silk reflecting softly, velvet background dark and plush. Low contrast but cinematic.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Make the viewer feel three textures at once: dry paper, slick vinyl, and soft skin. The LP must be part of her gesture, not a separate still-life prop.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 벨벳 속으로의 침잠
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 2.3 prompt - Sinking into velvet

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on CineStill 800T, 35mm film. Warm low-light cinematic look, soft amber glow, subtle red halation, deep shadows, gentle grain. A private rainy-night editorial frame.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sinks deep into a velvet sofa with her eyes closed. Her silk dress falls like liquid across the cushion, while the velvet holds the light heavily and quietly. The scene feels like a moment when the rain outside disappears and the room becomes a small, warm world.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private music lounge at night, insulated from the summer rain. Walnut wood panels, low amber light, soft music, calm indoor darkness.

## 4) Background & Props
Large velvet sofa, low table, dim lamp, LP records, walnut wall panels, soft amber reflections on silk.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical high-angle long shot. Yulim reclines diagonally across the velvet sofa, eyes closed, one arm relaxed near her side. Her full silhouette is visible without emphasizing the body. The frame should show the sofa texture, silk flow, and cozy room depth.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes when open, soft pink lips, long dark ash chocolate brown wavy hair with natural volume and see-through bangs. Outfit: deep blue silk slip dress, ivory summer net knit cardigan slipping softly from one shoulder. Makeup: transparent semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eye makeup, soft lip balm lips. Expression: eyes closed, fully relaxed, calm, safe, and quietly dreamy.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Low amber lighting, velvet absorbing light into deep soft shadows, silk catching thin glowing highlights. Warm brown, deep blue, ivory, and amber palette with subtle film grain.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The image should feel like weight and softness at the same time: the heavy hush of velvet, the fluid fall of silk, and the stillness of a rainy night indoors.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 흙과 피부의 고요한 교감
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 3.1 prompt - Quiet conversation between clay and skin

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 400, 35mm film. Soft diffused light, muted brown tones, gentle highlight rolloff, subtle grain. A quiet rain-gallery lifestyle portrait with earthy tactile warmth.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman slowly runs both hands over the rough surface of a terracotta vase. Her clear skin and the uneven clay texture meet in a quiet, almost comforting gesture. The rain outside turns the earthy material into something moist, warm, and alive.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Craft gallery near Bukchon or Samcheong-dong on a rainy summer day. Large glass windows, wet street outside, stone floor, soft cloudy natural light.

## 4) Background & Props
Terracotta vase on a wooden cube stand, stone floor, ceramic pieces, rain droplets on the large window, warm gray gallery interior.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium shot. Yulim stands close to the terracotta vase, both hands gently touching its surface. Her head is slightly lowered, face clearly visible in a soft three-quarter angle. Leave quiet negative space around her to keep the gallery mood calm.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, long dark ash chocolate brown layered hair with natural C-curl waves and see-through bangs. Outfit: oatmeal oversized linen shirt with sleeves naturally rolled to the forearms, deep brown embossed cotton wide pants. Makeup: thin semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft moist lips. Expression: small almost-hidden smile, quiet comfort, focused on the clay under her hands.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft overcast window light, warm gray shadows, oatmeal, brown, clay orange, and muted wood tones. Gentle low contrast, natural skin tone, tactile surface detail.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The clay surface should feel rough and slightly damp, while her gesture feels slow and tender. The portrait should be about touch before beauty.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 리넨의 호흡, 빗방울을 바라보는 여백
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 3.2 prompt - Linen breathing beside rainy glass

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 400, 35mm film. Muted warm gray and brown tones, soft diffused daylight, gentle highlight rolloff, subtle grain. A quiet rain-gallery portrait with calm negative space.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sits on a linen cushion by a large gallery window, watching raindrops slide down the glass. Her oversized linen shirt folds around her body in thick natural creases, as if the fabric is breathing with the damp summer air.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Minimal craft gallery in Bukchon or Samcheong-dong, rainy afternoon. Large glass window facing a wet street or courtyard, calm indoor air, soft stone floor.

## 4) Background & Props
Linen cushion by the window, rain trails on glass, wood cube stand, terracotta vase in the distance, muted ceramic objects, stone floor.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical wide shot. Yulim sits near the lower side of the frame with generous empty space around her. Her body is slightly curled inward, knees loosely gathered, gaze turned toward the rain on the window. Her face remains readable in side profile.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, long dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: oatmeal oversized linen shirt with visible natural wrinkles, deep brown embossed cotton wide pants. Makeup: clean transparent semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft lip balm lips. Expression: quiet, comforted, slightly lost in thought, peaceful rather than sad.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Cloudy diffused daylight through rainy glass, low contrast, muted oatmeal, stone gray, brown, and soft clay tones. The rain should blur the outside world gently.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Use empty space as part of the comfort. The linen wrinkles should feel soft and breathable, turning the rainy humidity into quiet ease.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 엠보 코튼의 보송한 안도감
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 3.3 prompt - Embossed cotton and soft reassurance

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Portra 400, 35mm film. Soft diffused natural light, muted brown palette, low contrast, subtle grain, gentle editorial lifestyle mood.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sits quietly with one knee raised, the embossed cotton texture of her deep brown pants catching the soft gallery light. The bottom edge of her linen shirt crosses the frame gently, adding a loose, breathable layer over the tactile fabric.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Quiet craft gallery near Bukchon or Samcheong-dong on a rainy summer afternoon. Calm indoor air, stone floor, cloudy light from a large window.

## 4) Background & Props
Stone floor, linen cushion, wooden cube stand, blurred terracotta vase and ceramic objects, rain-softened window light.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical half-view close-up. Frame from Yulim’s upper body to raised knee, keeping her face softly visible but allowing the embossed cotton pants to be the tactile focus. Her gaze is lowered toward the fabric or her hand resting on her knee.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes, slightly downturned outer eye corners, soft pink lips, long dark ash chocolate brown wavy hair with natural volume and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: oatmeal oversized linen shirt, deep brown embossed cotton wide pants with visible soft raised texture. Makeup: transparent semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eye shadow, soft moist lips. Expression: calm, inward, lightly comforted, with a relaxed mouth and soft eyes.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft cloudy side light revealing cotton texture, warm gray shadows, muted brown and oatmeal palette, clean skin tone, low contrast.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The pants should look soft and touchable, almost reassuring. The image should feel like a close, quiet pause in a rain-cooled gallery.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 굴절되는 빛, 아크릴의 단단한 감촉
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 4.1 prompt - Refracted light through acrylic

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Fujifilm Pro 400H, 35mm film. Cool airy tones, pastel blue and mint tint, soft low contrast, fine grain, clean reflective summer resort mood.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sits on the edge of an indoor pool, gently touching a transparent acrylic bangle with her fingertips. Blue water light passes through the acrylic and scatters softly across her skin. The humid air feels washed clean by glass, tile, and water.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
High-end boutique hotel indoor cabana in Seoul, rainy summer day. White tile, blue swimming pool, soft reflected water light, calm resort-like silence.

## 4) Background & Props
Pool edge, clear blue water, white tile, acrylic bangle, silver organza shirt, cabana bed nearby, small water droplets on skin and tile.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium shot. Yulim sits at the pool edge with one hand resting near the acrylic bangle. Her body is angled softly toward the water, face clearly visible in a fresh three-quarter view. Water reflections should pattern the lower frame.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown hair styled in a soft wet-hair look with natural face-framing strands. Outfit: black swimsuit under a silver sheer organza shirt, transparent acrylic bangle. Makeup: fresh semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, moist soft lips, clean summer look. Expression: fresh, calm, slightly cool, quietly enjoying the water light.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Clean front light with moving blue pool reflections, white and cyan palette, silver highlights on organza, transparent acrylic sparkle, airy low contrast.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The image should feel like cool water passing through a clear object. Acrylic, skin, water, and organza must all share the same clean reflective mood.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 물방울과 오간자의 충돌
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 4.2 prompt - Water droplets against organza

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Fujifilm Pro 400H, 35mm film. Airy cool pastel blue tones, fine grain, soft contrast, clean reflective water-light mood. A close tactile portrait of sheer fabric, wet hair, and skin.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman lightly pulls the collar of her silver organza shirt while water droplets cling to her wet hair, shoulder, and skin. The fabric looks almost weightless, like it might dissolve into the humid blue light.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Indoor pool cabana at a high-end boutique hotel, rainy summer day. Cool reflected light from the pool, white tile, quiet resort atmosphere.

## 4) Background & Props
Silver organza collar, wet hair ends, water droplets, black swimsuit strap subtly visible, blurred pool water and white cabana background.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical close-up. Frame the wet hair ends, neck, shoulder, organza collar, and one hand gently tugging the sheer fabric. Yulim’s face is partially visible and softly readable, gaze lowered toward her hand or slightly off-camera.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, soft pink lips, and dark ash chocolate brown hair styled in a natural wet-hair texture. Outfit: black swimsuit with a silver sheer organza shirt, transparent acrylic bangle may be softly visible. Makeup: clean semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eye makeup, soft moist lips. Expression: fresh, quiet, slightly absorbed in the feel of the fabric.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Cool blue water reflections, clean frontal softness, white tile bounce light, silver organza shimmer, transparent water droplets catching tiny highlights. Low contrast and airy.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Make the collision of textures visible: wet skin, fine water droplets, fragile organza, and soft hair. It should feel cool and delicate, not glamorous or overly posed.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 카바나의 푸른 그늘
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 4.3 prompt - Blue shade of the cabana

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Fujifilm Pro 400H, 35mm film. Cool pastel blue tones, airy softness, fine grain, low contrast, clean resort calm. A quiet indoor pool lifestyle editorial frame.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman lies diagonally on a white cabana bed, one calf lightly dipped into the pool water. Her silver organza shirt lifts slightly in the indoor breeze, while the blue shade around her makes the whole scene feel like a quiet underwater rest.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
High-end boutique hotel indoor cabana beside a blue swimming pool, rainy summer day. White tile, soft pool reflections, calm private resort atmosphere.

## 4) Background & Props
White cabana bed, blue pool water, white tile floor, silver organza shirt, transparent acrylic bangle, soft water reflections on nearby surfaces.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium-wide shot. Yulim reclines at a gentle diagonal on the cabana bed, one leg naturally extended toward the water with her calf lightly touching the pool. Her face is clearly visible, turned slightly toward the camera or toward the blue water. Keep the pose relaxed and lifestyle-focused.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown wet-look hair with soft face-framing strands. Outfit: black swimsuit, silver sheer organza shirt floating lightly, transparent acrylic bangle. Makeup: fresh semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft moist lip. Expression: cool, peaceful, quietly refreshed, as if resting after touching the water.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Clean soft light with blue pool reflections, white and cyan palette, silver translucent fabric highlights, low contrast, airy resort calm.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The whole frame should feel washed by water light. Keep it elegant, calm, and breathable, with the organza and water creating a light floating sensation.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 무광 백자와 부클레 니트의 포근한 온기
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 5.1 prompt - Matte porcelain and bouclé warmth

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Gold 200, 35mm film. Warm nostalgic tones, soft contrast, gentle grain, creamy highlights. A private tea house lifestyle portrait filled with woven comfort and quiet warmth.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman sits neatly on a bamboo mat and wraps both hands around a matte white porcelain teacup. A faint ribbon of steam rises from the cup, while the soft bouclé knit on her shoulders catches the warm light like tiny clouds.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private tea house on a rainy summer day. Soft backlight passing through rattan partitions, bamboo mat floor, low tea table, calm indoor warmth.

## 4) Background & Props
Matte white porcelain teacup, low wooden tea table, bamboo mat, rattan partition, dry tea leaves, tea scoop, soft cream and wood-toned interior.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical medium close-up. Yulim sits at the low tea table, both hands holding the teacup near her chest. Her face is clearly visible, gaze lowered toward the steam. The rattan partition forms a warm woven background layer.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown layered hair with natural C-curl waves and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: cream bouclé half-neck short-sleeve knit, light khaki cupro wrap midi skirt. Makeup: transparent semi-glow base, peach pink blush, natural brown eye makeup, moist soft pink lips. Expression: peaceful, harmless, quietly warmed by the cup.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft warm backlight through rattan, cream, wood, khaki, matte white porcelain tones, gentle nostalgic Kodak Gold warmth, subtle steam, soft grain.

## 8) Key Direction Point
Make the warmth feel touchable: matte porcelain, faint steam, soft bouclé texture, bamboo mat under her. The viewer should want to hold the same cup.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 촘촘한 대나무의 결
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 5.2 prompt - Bamboo weave shadows on the hand

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Gold 200, 35mm film. Warm nostalgic color, soft contrast, subtle grain, creamy natural highlights. A tactile tea house close-up with handmade craft atmosphere.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman gently lifts dry tea leaves with a bamboo tea scoop. Light slips through the rattan partition behind her, laying woven shadows across the back of her hand. The moment feels careful, quiet, and almost soundless.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private tea house during a rainy summer afternoon. Warm diffused light, rattan partition, bamboo mat, low tea table, calm handcrafted interior.

## 4) Background & Props
Bamboo tea scoop, dry tea leaves, matte ceramic tea container, low wooden table, rattan partition, bamboo mat, white porcelain teacup nearby.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical close-up to medium close-up. Focus on Yulim’s hand holding the bamboo tea scoop and the dry tea leaves. Her face is softly visible in the upper background, gaze lowered in concentration. The woven shadow should fall naturally on her hand.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with clear fair skin, soft oval face, gentle dark brown eyes, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and see-through bangs. Outfit: cream bouclé half-neck short-sleeve knit, light khaki cupro wrap midi skirt softly visible. Makeup: clean semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft lip balm lips. Expression: quiet concentration, gentle, careful, unhurried.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Warm soft backlight filtered through rattan, woven shadow patterns, cream and khaki tones, matte ceramic surfaces, dry tea leaf texture, subtle nostalgic film grain.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The hand, bamboo scoop, tea leaves, and woven shadow must feel connected. The frame should carry the small dry sound of tea leaves sliding from bamboo.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 큐프라의 찰랑임, 바람의 실루엣
cuts.prompt:
### Cut 5.3 prompt - Cupro shimmer in a tea house breeze

## 1) Photo Style & Mood
Analog film photography shot on Kodak Gold 200, 35mm film. Warm nostalgic tones, soft contrast, subtle grain, creamy highlights, quiet summer tea house atmosphere.

## 2) Scene Concept & Story
A beautiful young Korean woman walks slowly beside the tea house window, then turns slightly over her shoulder. Her light khaki cupro wrap skirt moves like water with each step, softly contrasting with the dry woven texture of the bamboo mat below.

## 3) Location / Time / Environment
Private tea house on a rainy summer afternoon. Warm filtered light, bamboo mat floor, rattan partition, low tea table, soft window glow.

## 4) Background & Props
Tea house window, bamboo mat, rattan partition, low wooden tea table, white porcelain teacup, soft wood and cream interior.

## 5) Camera Composition
3:4 vertical full-body shot. Yulim walks near the window, body angled away but turning back gently over one shoulder. Her face is clearly visible with soft eye contact or a slight glance toward the camera. The cupro skirt should catch motion and light, while the bamboo mat texture anchors the lower frame.

## 6) Model Expression
Yulim, a beautiful young Korean woman with a soft oval face, clear fair skin, gentle dark brown eyes with slightly downturned outer corners, calm innocent gaze, soft pink lips, and long layered dark ash chocolate brown hair with natural C-curl waves and 7:3 see-through bangs. Outfit: cream bouclé half-neck short-sleeve knit, light khaki cupro wrap midi skirt with fluid drape. Makeup: transparent semi-glow skin, peach pink blush, natural brown eyes, soft moist lips. Expression: peaceful, soft, slightly curious, like she heard someone call her name quietly.

## 7) Lighting · Color · Atmosphere
Soft warm window light, rattan-filtered backlight, cream, khaki, bamboo beige, and warm wood tones. Gentle nostalgic Kodak Gold warmth, subtle motion in the skirt.

## 8) Key Direction Point
The skirt should feel smooth and liquid, while the bamboo mat feels dry and woven. The image should leave the feeling of air moving through a quiet room.

## 9) Watermark
Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.
